description_long: This object is a classic handheld gaming console, specifically the original Nintendo Game Boy. It features a rectangular, slightly rounded plastic body in a light gray color, with a prominent greenish monochrome LCD screen set into the upper half of the front face. Below the screen are a black D-pad on the left, two magenta circular action buttons (A and B) on the right, and two smaller oval gray buttons (SELECT and START) in the center. The lower right corner has a set of horizontal speaker grille slots, and the top edge includes a visible power switch. The device is compact and portable, with a robust plastic shell and visible seams indicating a clamshell assembly. Branding and labeling are printed in blue and purple above and below the screen.
description: A classic Nintendo Game Boy handheld console with a gray plastic body, greenish LCD screen, magenta buttons, and distinctive branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, D-pad, magenta A and B buttons, SELECT and START buttons, and speaker grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, screen, and the raised buttons on the front face.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge, with the screen and buttons partially visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the profile, screen, and the arrangement of the D-pad and buttons.
